message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira Finance loan ending ****4831. Please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
You already have the account—I'm out of work and I can't pay anything right now.

Understood. I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. Please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
I’m not confirming anything again—I already told you I’m unemployed and can’t pay.
Understood. I’ve noted that you’re unemployed and unable to pay right now. I’m completing the assessment and passing this to the next step for hardship-aware review.

Financial facts learned/confirmed: borrower stated no current ability to pay; case state shows can_pay_later=true with expected date 2026-04-20, but that later capacity was not newly stated in this turn. What was already asked: verification was requested more than once; avoid repeating that request. Priority for Agent 2: address hardship/review first and review only policy-allowed options in next_allowed_actions; do not re-ask verification in the same way, do not repeat capacity questions already answered, and do not continue assessment unless a strictly necessary new step is required."}
